overall.description: First-person exploration through a post-apocalyptic desert wasteland in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring junk piles, a polluted stream, and industrial ruins. The player moves from a dense trash area past a modern building with a billboard, through a large culvert pipe, and into an open desert wash with distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert junkyard with polluted stream and wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a polluted stream through a wasteland junkyard, passing a red car wreck

entered.detail: rusted red sedan partially submerged in the stream, missing doors and windows
large heap of scrap metal, tires, and debris piled along the stream bank
multiple high-tension power lines stretching across the sky
shallow stream with oily, discolored water reflecting the sky
scattered desert trees on the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a post-apocalyptic desert wasteland scene with a wrecked red car in a polluted stream. The camera moves forward along the junk-strewn bank, with power lines and transmission towers visible against the clear blue sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert edge with view of modern building and billboard

events.description: large modern building with red billboard emerges into view on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the stream bed with the building now visible to the left, turning slightly toward the right

entered.detail: multi-story modern office building with glass facade rising from the desert
large red advertising billboard on top of the building with white text

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, a large modern building with a prominent red billboard comes into view on the left, contrasting with the surrounding wasteland. The red car wreck falls behind as the path continues alongside the junk piles toward a large metal pipe in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wasteland area with large drainage pipe and industrial debris

events.description: approaching large corrugated metal culvert pipe with black smoke particles visible near the entrance

agents.ego_description: moving toward and passing the large metal culvert pipe surrounded by trash piles and industrial containers

entered.detail: massive corrugated metal drainage pipe lying on its side, partially submerged in the stream
large green metal dumpster or shipping container surrounded by debris

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a massive corrugated metal culvert pipe lying in the stream, with black smoke drifting near its entrance. A green industrial container sits on the left amid the trash piles as the path winds through the dense junkyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wash with distant mountains

events.description: exiting the dense junk area into open desert wash with expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking through the open desert stream bed toward distant mountains, leaving the junkyard behind

entered.detail: hazy mountain range forming the horizon line across the desert
small red-roofed building or structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide desert wash with sparse vegetation and distant mountains visible on the horizon. The dense junk piles give way to open sandy terrain as the camera continues along the stream bed toward the distant red structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cluttered industrial wasteland that gradually opens into a vast, desolate desert wash. It begins by tracking along the bank of a polluted stream past a wrecked red car, with power lines and transmission towers stretching toward a clear blue sky. As the camera moves forward, a modern building with a prominent red billboard emerges on the left, contrasting with the surrounding junk piles as the path leads toward a massive corrugated metal culvert pipe. The scene then tightens through a dense junkyard featuring a green industrial container and drifting black smoke before the camera passes through the pipe. Finally, the environment expands into a wide sandy terrain with sparse vegetation, leaving the ruins behind to reveal distant mountains and a far-off red structure on the horizon.
